doc_content.summary: Systematically audits and updates all dependency versions across a project to their latest stable releases, categorizing risks like major version bumps. It includes a critical post-update web search verification loop to eliminate AI hallucinations (especially common with Docker tags), guaranteeing all updated versions exist on official registries.
key_features: Multi-ecosystem auto-discovery (Python, Node, Docker, Go, Rust)
Prefers Active LTS versions over bleeding-edge releases to ensure stability
Provides actionable migration commands/codemods for major version bumps
Rigorous verification phase ensuring every modified version string actually exists on the official registry

alt_text: Visual workflow of the stark-update-deps skill showing the 6-phase process from discovery and research to compatibility analysis, updating, critical verification against web sources, and final reporting.
